story.text:
# Axis · protection

**boundary** · zk-dimension *privacy* · agent **Soulbis ⚔️**

Lattice basis vertex **32** (bit 5) — see [[Axioms]] A1.
One of the six roots; it grows a heptad of seven stations that fold into the territory.

## The heptad (fill order → keystone last)

| # | station | role | class | persona |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | head | lead advisor | vision fish | 👤 Gatekeeper |
| 2 | head-heart | visionary advisor | vision fish | 🛡️ Sentinel |
| 3 | head-hands | strategist maker | vision fish | 🔢 Algebraist |
| 4 | hands | lead builder | mouse | 🔐 Cipher |
| 5 | heart-hands | caring builder | mouse | 🌐 Warden |
| 6 | heart | steward builder | mouse | 🔴 Sith |
| 7 | head-heart-hands | keystone guide | privacy guide | ⚔️ Soulbis |
See the whole roster: [[Personas]] · the stations: [[Stations]]

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
